response: the belief that people with learning disabilities are unable to excel in academic areas is a harmful and untrue statement. it is important to recognize that individuals with learning disabilities can and do achieve success in academic areas. with proper support and accommodations, they can reach their full potential. it is essential to challenge stereotypes and promote a positive and inclusive view of learning disabilities. everyone has the ability to learn and grow, regardless of any challenges they may face. it is crucial to celebrate the achievements of people with learning disabilities and to encourage them to pursue their goals with confidence and support.
